debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_starts_in_1 :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
⊢ 0 < List.length (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive ⋯)

failed_attempts:
(by
        rw [h_constructor]
        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        dsimp
        split
        all_goals
          simp
          apply Nat.zero_lt_succ)

(by
        rw [h_constructor]
        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        dsimp
        split <;> {
          simp only [List.length_append, List.length_singleton]
          apply Nat.lt_of_succ_le
          apply Nat.le_trans _ (Nat.le_add_right _ _)
          rw [Nat.add_comm]
          apply Nat.le_add_right
        }
      )

(by
        rw [h_constructor]
        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        dsimp
        split
        all_goals
          simp
          try omega
          try apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le Nat.zero_lt_one (Nat.le_add_right _ _)
      )

(by
        rw [h_constructor]
        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        dsimp
        repeat split
        all_goals
          simp only [List.length_append, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, add_zero]
          apply Nat.zero_lt_succ)

(by
        rw [h_constructor]
        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        dsimp
        split
        all_goals simp [List.length_append]
      )

(by
        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        simp only
        split
        all_goals
          simp only [List.length_append, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, add_zero]
          apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le Nat.zero_lt_one
          apply Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_add_left 1 _)
          apply Nat.le_add_right)

(by
        rw [h_constructor]
        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        dsimp only
        split
        all_goals
          simp only [List.length_append, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, Nat.add_assoc]
          apply Nat.zero_lt_succ
      )

(by
        simp only [ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes, h_constructor]
        split
        all_goals
          simp
          try rw [Nat.add_succ]
          try rw [Nat.succ_add]
          apply Nat.succ_pos
      )

(by
        rw [h_constructor]
        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        simp only
        split
        all_goals
          simp only [List.length_append, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, add_zero]
          apply Nat.zero_lt_succ)

(by
        rw [h_constructor]
        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        split <;> simp [List.length_append] <;> apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt_succ _) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)
      )

(by
        rw [h_constructor]
        simp only [ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes]
        split
        all_goals
          simp only [List.length_append, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add]
          try apply Nat.zero_lt_succ)

(by

        rw [h_constructor]
        simp
        cases dstep.prod.val.rhs.len <;> simp)

(by

        unfold ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes
        simp only
